narrative:
Hudson 2-E (precinct in Summit County) has 1,215 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
